zh.lifeSummary: 當Emma di Lecce於1125年出生在義大利普格利亞特拉 達特朗托時，她的父親Conte di Lecce Accardo di Lecce II11122歲，母親Contessa di Lecce Matillia Comtesse de Lecce36歲。她於1134年與Roger III d'Apulie Duc d'Apulie在義大利普格利亞萊斯結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1194年在義大利西西利亞巴勒莫享年69歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Emma di Lecce于1125年出生在意大利普格利亞特拉 達特朗托时，她的父亲Conte di Lecce Accardo di Lecce II11122岁，母亲Contessa di Lecce Matillia Comtesse de Lecce36岁。她于1134年与Roger III d'Apulie Duc d'Apulie在意大利普格利亞萊斯结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1194年在意大利西西利亞巴勒莫享年69岁。

nameMeanings.name: di
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Mandarin form of the surname 狄, a term referring to the tribes in ancient northern China: (i) from Di (狄), the name of an ancient state (thought to have been located in Hebei or Shandong province), which was granted to Xiao Bo or Kao Bo by King Cheng of Zhou (reigned 1042–1021  BC ). (ii) adopted as a surname by the Ku Di (庫狄) family during the Northern Wei dynasty (386–534  AD ). (iii) traced back to other minority ethnic groups in ancient northwestern China.

Mandarin form of the Chinese surname 邸, meaning ‘official residence’ in Chinese: (i) from placename Di (邸), the name of a county (unidentified location). (ii) said to be borne by some descendants of Kujula Kadphises (called 丘就郤 or 邸就郤 in Chinese, 30–c. 80 AD ), founder of the Kushan Empire (one branch of the Yuezhi people originating from western China) located in Central Asia during the Eastern Han dynasty (25–220 AD ).

variants.name: Chi
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Young, Dong, Yun, Cheng, Jae, Yong, Cheng Chung, Chi, Chun, Duk, Fang, Feng.  Korean Chung, Chong, Jae Hong, Moon, Myong, Pong, Shen, Yoo, Byung, Chang, Chol, Chong Hun.  Southeast Asian Phi, Hung, Ly, Tu, Denh, Do Van, Duong, Hao, Kieu, Mui, Nga, Phat.

Chinese: Mandarin and Cantonese form of the surname 池, meaning ‘moat’ in ancient Chinese: (i) acquired as a surname by people who lived beside a moat. (ii) from Chi (池), said to be the name of an ancient state (of unknown location and period). (iii) from the personal name Chi (池), personal name of a son of an official in the state of Qin during the Spring and Autumn period (770–476  BC ).

Chinese: Mandarin and Cantonese form of the surname 遲, meaning ‘late’ in Chinese: (i) borne by descendants of Chi Ren (遲任), a person who lived during the Shang dynasty (1600–1046  BC ). (ii) shortened form of the Chinese compound surname Yu-Chi (尉遲), originally the name of a tribe from the Xianbei ethnic group in northern China. (iii) from the second element of the personal name Zi Chi (子遲), style name of Fan Xu, a student of Confucius (551–479  BC ).

nameMeanings.name: Lecce
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Gino, Vito, Angelo, Filippo, Lucio, Luigi, Maddalena, Orazio, Rocco, Vincenzo, Vittorio.
Italian: habitational name from any of several places called Lecce, notably the city in Apulia.

variants.name: Leccese
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Cosmo, Salvatore, Gaetano, Pasquale, Alessandro, Libero, Vito.
Italian: habitational name for someone from Lecce (see   Lecce  ).

nameMeanings.name: Emma
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Old French name, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, originally a short form of compound names such as Ermintrude containing the word erm(en), irm(en) ‘entire’. It was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain, but its popularity in medieval England was greatly enhanced by the fact that it had been borne by the mother of Edward the Confessor, herself a Norman. In modern times, it was only in moderate use early in the 20th century but rose sharply in favour in the 1970s and has since remained perennially popular.

en.lifeSummary: When Emma di Lecce was born in 1125, in Terra d'Otranto, Puglia, Italy, her father, Conte di Lecce Accardo di Lecce II, was 11122 and her mother, Contessa di Lecce Matillia Comtesse de Lecce, was 36. She married Roger III d'Apulie Duc d'Apulie in 1134, in Lecce, Puglia, Italy. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 2 daughters. She died in 1194, in Palermo, Sicily, Italy, at the age of 69.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Emma di Lecce est née en 1125, à Terra d'Otranto, Puglia, Italie, son père, Conte di Lecce Accardo di Lecce II, avait 11122 ans et sa mère, Contessa di Lecce Matillia Comtesse de Lecce, avait 36 ans. Elle a épousé Roger III d'Apulie Duc d'Apulie en 1134, à Lecce, Puglia, Italie. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée en 1194, à Palermo, Sicile, Italie, à l’âge de 69 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Emma di Lecce 1125 in Terra d'Otranto, Puglia, Italien geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Conte di Lecce Accardo di Lecce II 11122 und ihre Mutter Contessa di Lecce Matillia Comtesse de Lecce 36. Sie hat 1134 in Lecce, Puglia, Italien Roger III d'Apulie Duc d'Apulie geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb 1194 im Alter von 69 Jahren in Palermo, Sizilien, Italien.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Emma di Lecce è nata il nel 1125 nel Terra d'Otranto, Puglia, Italia, sua padre, Conte di Lecce Accardo di Lecce II, aveva 11122 anni e sua madre, Contessa di Lecce Matillia Comtesse de Lecce, aveva 36 anni. Lei sposato Roger III d'Apulie Duc d'Apulie nel 1134, nel Lecce, Puglia, Italia. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 2 figlie. Morì nel 1194, nel Palermo, Sicilia, Italia, all'età di 69 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Emma di Lecceが1125年にイタリアプウグリアテラ ド'オトラントーで生まれた時，父Conte di Lecce Accardo di Lecce IIは11122歳，母Contessa di Lecce Matillia Comtesse de Lecceは36歳であった。1134年にイタリアプウグリアレクスでRoger III d'Apulie Duc d'Apulieと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1194年にイタリアシシリアプアラーモで69歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Emma di Lecce(이)가 1125년 이탈리아 푸그리야 터라 드'트랜토에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Conte di Lecce Accardo di Lecce II(은)는 11122세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Contessa di Lecce Matillia Comtesse de Lecce(은)는 36세였다. 그녀는 1134년 이탈리아 푸그리야 렉스에서 Roger III d'Apulie Duc d'Apulie(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1194년 이탈리아 시실리야 파일모에서 69세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Emma di Lecce nasceu em 1125, em Terra d'Otranto, Puglia, Itália, seu pai, Conte di Lecce Accardo di Lecce II, tinha 11122 anos e sua mãe, Contessa di Lecce Matillia Comtesse de Lecce, tinha 36 anos. Ela casou-se com Roger III d'Apulie Duc d'Apulie em 1134, em Lecce, Puglia, Itália. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1194, em Palermo, Sicilia, Itália, com 69 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Emma di Lecce родилась в 1125 г. в местности тирра д'отранто, пугля, Италия, её отцу по имени Conte di Lecce Accardo di Lecce II было 11122 года, а матери, которую звали Contessa di Lecce Matillia Comtesse de Lecce, 36. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Roger III d'Apulie Duc d'Apulie в 1134 г. в местности лекс, пугля, Италия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери. Она умерла в 1194 г. в местности пеилирмо, сисиля, Италия в возрасте 69 лет.

sm.from 1170 to 1178: mai le 1170 e o'o I le 1178

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Emma di Lecce nació en 1125, en Terra d'Otranto, Puglia, Italia, su papá, Conte di Lecce Accardo di Lecce II, tenía 11122 años y su mamá, Contessa di Lecce Matillia Comtesse de Lecce, tenía 36 años. Se casó con Roger III d'Apulie Duc d'Apulie en 1134, en Lecce, Puglia, Italia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió en 1194, en Palermo, Sicilia, Italia, a la edad de 69 años.
